---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement for terminal-jail
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. What gap exists in terminal-jail's current capabilities?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be specific — what should the user experience be?

## Use Case
Who benefits from this and how? Is this for plugin users, CLI users, systemd integrators, or all three?

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered workarounds or alternative approaches? What are they and why aren't they sufficient?

## Scope
- [ ] Plugin (`plugin/`)
- [ ] Standalone CLI (`standalone/`)
- [ ] systemd integration (`systemd/`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Kernel Compatibility
Does this feature require specific kernel features or versions? If uncertain, note what capabilities you think are needed and the maintainers will evaluate.

## Additional Context
Links to related issues, prior art (other sandboxing projects), or any other context.
